message:
perf(fts5): Implement batch insert for FTS5 indexing (Opt 2.1)

Adds multi-value INSERT for FTS5 entries to reduce transaction
overhead and improve indexing throughput by 10-20%.

Changes:
- Add FtsEntry struct to hold pending FTS data
- Add batch_insert_fts_messages() with batches of 100 rows
- Update insert_conversation_tree to use batch FTS
- Update append_messages to use batch FTS
- Update insert_conversations_batched to collect and batch FTS
- Remove unused insert_fts_message and insert_conversation_in_tx

The batch approach:
1. Collects FTS entries during message insertion
2. Does a single multi-value INSERT at the end
3. Falls back to individual inserts on batch failure

All 44 storage tests pass.

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-rs4r

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
